ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "is_deluxe" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album is a deluxe version */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "album_cover_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover image */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the album contains explicit content */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profile */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "influence_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the artist's influence in the music industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number within the album */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the track */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the track's popularity */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the composer of the track */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL to the track's audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_composer_id FOREIGN KEY ("composer_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line of lyric */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track the lyric belongs to */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number within the lyric */,
  "lyric_text" TEXT /* Text of the lyric line */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time stamp of the lyric line within the track */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the lyric line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "album_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album version */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original album */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the album version (e.g., Deluxe, Remastered) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album version was released */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the album version (e.g., deluxe, remastered, live) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_album_versions_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the contribution */,
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lyric that was contributed */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., submission, correction) */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the moderator who reviewed the contribution */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was reviewed */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation decision (e.g., why the contribution was rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_lyric_id FOREIGN KEY ("lyric_id") REFERENCES lyrics ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contributor, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who engaged with the content */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album that was engaged with */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track that was engaged with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the user's engagement level with the content */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is receiving the recommendation */,
  "recommended_album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended album */,
  "recommended_track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recommended track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., similar to liked tracks, popular in the same genre) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)
